⚙ GitHub Sync Settings
How it works

Your dashboard lives in a GitHub repository and is served via GitHub Pages as a permanent URL. Every time you add a new exam, this app automatically updates that file — so anyone opening the link instantly sees the latest exam data.

One-time setup (~5 minutes)
1
Go to github.com/new and create a public repository (e.g., synergy-dashboard)
2
Go to github.com/settings/tokens/new → generate a Classic token with repo scope checked
3
Enter your repo and token below, then click "Upload Dashboard to GitHub"
4
In your GitHub repo → Settings → Pages → Source: Deploy from branch → main → / (root) → Save
5
Your URL will be https://[username].github.io/[repo-name]/ — share it with all instructors ✓
Configuration
Find this in your GitHub repo URL: github.com/username/repo-name
Actions
⏳ Fetching current file from GitHub…
